name: Zoho Cliq
mcp_notes: No official or well-known community MCP server was found for Zoho Cliq in the provided sources.
access_notes: Developers can sign up for a Zoho account for free and register applications in the Zoho Developer Console to obtain OAuth credentials.
one_liner: Zoho Cliq is a team collaboration and chat application that provides a developer platform for building integrations, bots, commands, and automating workflows.

evidence.claim: Zoho Cliq's REST API is designed based on RESTful architecture principles, enabling seamless communication between your applications and Zoho Cliq.
Zoho Cliq API is organized around REST, and follows HTTP rules. Cliq REST APIs are authenticated with an OAuth token. Register as a new client in Zoho's Developer Console.
Sign Up For Free (Zoho Developer REST APIs).
Search citation: Getting Started with Zoho Cliq Developer Platform

auth_notes: The primary authentication method is OAuth 2.0. The documentation also mentions API tokens for integration components created within the platform.
api_notes: The API provides moderate coverage, focusing on integration with chat functionalities (bots, channels, commands) and business automation. While it covers core messaging and automation, it is not a complete mirror of every internal UI action.
